results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building web and native user interfaces out of individual components, designed for creating interactive and dynamic applications.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces. It allows developers to create interactive web and native applications using reusable components, enabling efficient and scalable UI development.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with reusable components, hooks, and APIs for managing state and side effects.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with reusable components, hooks, and APIs for creating interactive web applications.

results.title: React
results.description: This repository contains the source code and documentation for the official React website, react.dev, which is built using Next.js.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces, focused on declarative components and efficient updates.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a JavaScript library for building user interfaces with reusable components, enabling efficient rendering and state management.

results.title: React-admin
results.description: A frontend Framework for building single-page applications running in the browser on top of REST/GraphQL APIs, using TypeScript, React, react-router, react-hook-form, react-query, and Material Design.

results.title: React Facebook
results.description: Modern, TypeScript-ready, and feature-complete React components for integrating the complete Facebook SDK, offering features like Login, Share, Comments, Videos, and Facebook Pixel integration.

results.title: React
results.description: React is a declarative, component-based JavaScript library for building user interfaces, primarily for single-page applications.

results.title: Keep React
results.description: Keep React is an open-source component library built on Tailwind CSS and React.js, offering pre-designed UI components to streamline the creation of modern, responsive web applications.

results.title: React Remark
results.description: React Remark provides React hooks and components for rendering Markdown into React elements using the remark ecosystem.

results.title: React Select
results.description: React Select is a flexible and extensible select control for React applications, offering customizable styling, component injection, and support for advanced features like option groups and portal support.

results.title: React i18next
results.description: Internationalization for react done right. Using the i18next i18n ecosystem.

results.title: React on Rails
results.description: React on Rails seamlessly integrates React components into Ruby on Rails applications with server-side rendering, hot reloading, and automatic bundle optimization using Rspack or Webpack.

results.title: React Spring Bottom Sheet
results.description: A highly animated, accessible, and customizable bottom sheet component for React applications, built with react-spring and react-use-gesture.

results.title: Ra Core
results.description: Ra Core is a headless Single-Page Application framework for React, offering battle-tested hooks and components to build high-performance apps using react-query, react-hook-form, react-router, and TypeScript with REST or GraphQL APIs.

results.title: React Window
results.description: React components for efficiently rendering large lists and tabular data by only rendering items within the viewport.

results.title: Atomize React
results.description: Atomize React is a UI framework and design system for React JS. It helps developers and designers collaborate to build consistent, responsive, and modern user interfaces effortlessly, offering a flexible grid, style guide, and a rich component library.

results.title: Atomic Router React
results.description: React bindings for Atomic Router, a routing library for React applications, enabling navigation between different views.

results.title: 4Dev React
results.description: A system built with ReactJs, Hooks, and Recoil, following TDD, Clean Architecture, and SOLID principles, designed for creating programmer surveys.

results.title: React Roast
results.description: React Roast is an open-source React widget and app inspector for collecting feedback, capturing element states and screenshots on webpages, useful for UI/UX testing and debugging.

results.title: Primer React
results.description: Primer React is a React implementation of GitHub's Primer Design System, providing reusable components for building consistent user interfaces.

results.title: React
results.description: React.dev is the official documentation website for React, a JavaScript library for building user interfaces, providing guides, API references, and tutorials.

results.title: React Email
results.description: React Email provides high-quality, unstyled components for creating responsive emails with dark mode support, simplifying email development across various clients.

results.title: React Router
results.description: React Router is a multi-strategy router for React, bridging React 18 to 19, usable as a framework or a library.

results.title: React Keycloak
results.description: React Keycloak provides React bindings for Keycloak, enabling authentication and authorization for React applications, including web, SSR, and React Native.

results.title: React Router Navigation Prompt
results.description: A React component that prompts users to confirm navigation, serving as a replacement for react-router's built-in <Prompt/> component to allow for more flexible and custom dialogs.

results.title: Anchor for React
results.description: Fine-grained reactive state for React. Separates logic (setup(), runs once) from view (reactive templates/snippets). Core APIs: mutable(), immutable(), setup(), render(), template(), snippet(), effect(). Rules: Import '@anchorlib/react/client' first. Never destructure props in setup. Use props.$omit() for rest props. Patterns: Logic-driven design (data+methods), stable scopes (no useCallback), surgical mutations, auto-tracking (no dep arrays). Universal RSC/SSR/CSR support.

results.title: React UI
results.description: React UI is a library of common React components with Less customization, forming part of a larger design ecosystem for Kontur interfaces.
